name: KSHV_full_genome
description: Kaposi sarcoma-associated herpesvirus (HHV-8, KSHV) gamma-2-herpesvirus: linear dsDNA ~165 kb (~140 kb unique long region + ~30 kb of GC-rich terminal repeats). Causative agent of Kaposi sarcoma, primary effusion lymphoma (PEL), multicentric Castleman disease, and KSHV inflammatory cytokine syndrome (KICS). Establishes latency in B cells and endothelial cells. Encodes ~90 ORFs including many host-mimicking gene captures (vIL-6, vBcl-2, vIRFs, vCyclin, vFLIP) and a cluster of 12 viral microRNAs. Latency-associated nuclear antigen (LANA, ORF73) tethers the episome to host chromatin via its central tandem-repeat domain.
expected_copy_count: 1-150 episomal copies per latent B cell; thousands of linear genomes per lytic cell
